name: Pic-Time Uploader
description: Photo uploader desktop app for Pic-Time photographer galleries

extraction.note: No version in URL or headers. Only method: download PKG, extract receipt, read version. Use ETag or Last-Modified comparison to detect changes.

changelog.note: No public changelog, release notes, or version history found

release_date.note: Use Last-Modified header on CDN PKG as proxy for release date

notes: Auth-gated — the uploader is only accessible to logged-in Pic-Time users. The download page is behind the account dashboard. No Homebrew cask. No known Sparkle appcast or version endpoint. CDN directory listing is disabled. Version tracking requires downloading the PKG or monitoring modification time/checksum.
